title: Agave DAO, Hundred Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by nested borrow functions on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls nested borrow functions after a flash loan in the same tx

monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS NESTED_BORROW AFTER FLASHLOAN IN SAME TX
summary: Agave DAO and Hundred Finance fell victim to a reentrancy attack using flash loans. Attackers nested borrow functions to increase borrowing amounts before updating debt balances, leading to significant losses. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
